selectedTaskBefore.title: Align nested inspection-root and execution-root semantics across prompting, execution, and verification
selectedTaskBefore.notes: Ralph now persists explicit workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, and provenance bundles. `codex exec` plus validation/git verifiers now run from the selected inspection root while `.ralph` stays anchored at the workspace root. Manual inspection-root override for ambiguous umbrella workspaces is still pending before this parent task can close.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Align nested inspection-root and execution-root semantics across prompting, execution, and verification
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Ralph now persists explicit workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, and provenance bundles. `codex exec` plus validation/git verifiers run from the selected inspection root while `.ralph` stays anchored at the workspace root, and `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` now provides a deterministic manual override for ambiguous umbrella workspaces with evidence, status, docs, and regression coverage.
